text: Science has a clearer story about Parker Solar Probe than social media does. Launched in 2018, this mission dives into the Sun's outer atmosphere, revealing mysteries. It’s the fastest human-made object, reaching speeds over 430,000 miles per hour! By flying close, it studies solar winds and their impact on Earth. Understanding the Sun could protect our technology and lives. Curious about what else we’re discovering in space? Hit follow for more!
